summary: Multiple sources report shift from naive RAG to agentic retrieval with tool use for internal doc graphs. Relevant for onboarding copilots and developer assistants.

theme: AI code review copilots in CI/CD
summary: GitHub, GitLab, and enterprise vendors shipping PR-aware copilots with policy and stack-specific hints. Strong builder-community interest on Hacker News and Product Hunt.
Enterprises adopting catalogs of AI pilots with ownership metadata for reuse and compliance. Aligns with EU AI Act documentation expectations.
Learning platforms updating CAP and BTP curricula with personalized paths; edtech product roadmaps emphasize adaptive onboarding.
